title: Widget assets radar default image
description: Add AggregatorWidget/Assets.xcassets with a bundled radar-themed default hero image (reusing the dark-navy radar motif from the app icon asset). This image serves as the fallback containerBackground when an item has no imageURL. Provide at sufficient resolution (@1x/@2x/@3x) for both small and medium widget sizes. Reference the asset from WidgetViews.swift as the no-hero fallback.
acceptance_criteria: AggregatorWidget/Assets.xcassets contains the radar default image asset
Asset is referenced in WidgetViews.swift when item.imageURL is nil
Image is included in the AggregatorWidget target's resource build phase in project.yml
Widget renders the radar image as background when no hero URL is present
